name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_wru_uvw_a_signs
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_wru' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_a_signs' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`conditiondate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`date_of_last_level_2_inspection` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`last_updated_from_ras` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`date_asset_was_identified` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`conditiondate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`date_of_last_level_2_inspection` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`last_updated_from_ras` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`date_asset_was_identified` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'conditiondate|date_of_last_level_2_inspection|last_updated_from_ras|date_asset_was_identified' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_wru`.`uvw_a_signs`
